title: astragalus lotiflorus
intro: Astragalus lotiflorus, also known as the two-flowered milk vetch, is a perennial legume native to China and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as boosting the immune system, reducing stress, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus lotiflorus can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
